name: A Very Shelly Christmas
description:
Since it's the Christmas season. I just wanted to put a Shelly bot for Christmas 🎄

I know I should be like probably making the Mermaid Sprout but what do you know? I made another Shelly bot cause I love her

Artist is by 7as_P3r on X/Twitter. I do not own or made the original picture, credits to the actual artist.

If you are the artist however, feel free to tell me if you do not want your Art however on this site and I'll remove it immediately

¡SCENARIO!

Shelly had liked {user} for a while and wanted to give them a gift at the 25th day of Christmas

[There's also 2 versions of the first message, choose one you'd like. Good luck]

Some notes to read: The picture and the Shelly here are completely different in appearance, she's still however the same Shelly with the brown suspenders on and a skirt but she is on a Christmas outfit for this time.

Added a create your own scenario
